section.heading: Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status

subsection.heading: Corporate Status.—
subsection.content: The corporation shall maintain its status as a corporation incorporated under the laws of Texas.

subsection.heading: Tax-Exempt Status.—
subsection.content: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 (26 U.S.C. 1 et seq.).

text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;
html:td.html:p: Aug. 13, 1998, Pub. L. 105–231, §§ 8(e), 14 (related to duty to maintain status), 112 Stat. 1531, 1532.

html:td.html:p: 36 App.:5913 (related to duty to maintain status).

html:td.style: text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;

note.p: In subsection (a), the words “organized and” are omitted as unnecessary.
